Interface ConvertFunction<M extends net.minecraft.world.entity.Entity, E extends Entity>

Type Parameters:
M - the type of the original Minecraft entity (must extend Entity)
E - the type of the resulting Bukkit entity (must extend Entity)
All Superinterfaces:
BiFunction<org.bukkit.craftbukkit.CraftServer, M, E>
Functional Interface:
This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
@FunctionalInterface public interface ConvertFunction<M extends net.minecraft.world.entity.Entity, E extends Entity> extends BiFunction<org.bukkit.craftbukkit.CraftServer, M, E>
A functional interface representing a conversion function that transforms a Minecraft entity of type M into a Bukkit entity of type E, using the given CraftServer context.

  • Method Summary

    Methods inherited from interface BiFunction

    andThen, apply
